overview.name: GraphQL Response Mode
overview.description:
This scenario verifies difference between strict and lenient response comparison modes for GraphQL.
Test flow includes: 1. Send GraphQL mutation and validate response using lenient mode with partial expected JSON. 2. Send the same GraphQL mutation and validate response using strict mode with full expected JSON. 3. Reset in-memory GraphQL storage after test.
This scenario validates: - Lenient mode allows partial GraphQL response validation - Strict mode requires full GraphQL response match - Same GraphQL response can be validated differently depending on comparison mode

graphql.comment: Step 1. Validate GraphQL mutation response using lenient mode where partial expected JSON is enough
Step 2. Validate GraphQL mutation response using strict mode where full expected JSON is required
Step 3. Reset GraphQL storage after response comparison mode test
